reviews.text: Bex was absolutely phenomenal as our engagement photographer!!! She was a surprise to me from my fiancé and we couldn’t have asked for a better person. She was so friendly and really made the moment so special. Her photos truly reflect all the happiness that was shared in every moment. We can’t recommend her enough as a photographer for any occasion!!!

We came here on vacation and i found Bex on google. She was super easy to work with! I would totally use her again for family photos if we come back to the Vail area. Thanks again Bex :) You took gorgeous pictures!

Bex made our first mountain family photo session awesome! She was very flexible and easy to coordinate with, knowledgeable about locations, and the leaving the time of day up to her was fantastic for getting the best lighting conditions possible.  She did a great job engaging with our kiddos (5 and 8) and we got super-cute shots that will now appear on our holiday cards!  The turnaround for the preview gallery as well as final images was fast and efficient too.  It was a wonderful experience and we would highly recommend Bex and her work!

We loved Bex and our time with her.  I emailed lots of photographers in Vail looking for someone to take my daughter's senior photos there.  I liked the way Bex did her packages the best, so chose her based on that.  My daughter was very worried and feeling self-conscious the day of the shoot, but Bex made is all better.  She was charming, sweet, easy-going, and professional.  Can't wait to see the photos.  From what I saw that day, they will be perfect.

Bex did such an amazing job with our engagement photos! She was such a pleasure to work with right off the bat, from offering great locations to shoot (as I’m not a Vail native) and being so accommodating when I kept changing my mind. When we met her in person, I knew we had made the right choice going with White Starfish Photography, as she was so sweet and made both my fiancé and I feel at ease during our shoot! We could tell Bex really cared about getting great shots for us and when she sent us our final gallery, we were thrilled. My whole family was so impressed with the photos and I know we’ll cherish them forever. Thanks so much Bex for making this process fun, easy, and doing such a great job! I highly recommend White Starfish Photography!!
